title: Creamy French Éclair Tart
description: A creative twist on the classic French dessert, this tart combines the flaky pastry with a creamy éclair filling.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch (3 mm).
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch (23 cm) tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a small bowl, whisk together the unsalted butter, granulated sugar, and French mustard.
Pour the cream into a separate bowl and whisk until soft peaks form.
Add the eggs one at a time, whisking until combined.
Pour the cream mixture into the pastry-lined tart pan.
Drizzle the éclair filling over the cream mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
